title: I notice somethings
wikitext:
[]: I notice somethings             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Wed Aug 23, 2006 5:30 pm Rei/Shogouki's right eye and arm is/was damaged. Rei's was in the first few episodes, and Sho's was in episode 2. Sho's arm was damaged in the battle with Zeruel, whichever episode that was.

[]: Re: I notice somethings             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Aug 23, 2006 8:28 pm Rahaquiel-2D1S wrote: Rei/Shogouki's right eye and arm is/was damaged. Rei's was in the first few episodes, and Sho's was in episode 2. Sho's arm was damaged in the battle with Zeruel, whichever episode that was.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Aug 23, 2006 9:01 pm I don't look into it anymore than "Hey, that was cool, let's do it again!".

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Aug 23, 2006 10:01 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: I don't look into it anymore than "Hey, that was cool, let's do it again!".

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Wed Aug 23, 2006 11:14 pm Reichu wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: I don't look into it anymore than "Hey, that was cool, let's do it again!".

[]:             Quote Post by Xanatose » Wed Aug 23, 2006 11:36 pm Although taking simmilar injuries at different points in the story can be seen as meaningful, it's far from likely that this is meant to be taken on the same level as, say, the repeated shots of Shinji's flexing hands, or shots of Shinji staring at his palm. Where this is most significant between different charecters is likely where the shot is repeated from the exact same angle, akin to when Gendo looks to his own hand and its new addition in a way that mirrors Shinji. And this is the key. That these repeated injuries may be nothing more than "mirror" shots meant to suggest foreshadowing, or a literary parallel. Other examples include the repeated cranal injuries, and the infamous eye-patch/arm cast sported by Rei and Asuka. I take it as being somewhat more significant than, "that looked cool, lets do it again!" but somewhat less relevant than "Asuka and Rei are the same person at the end! It all fits in a cosmic dance of Combellion Imperative Imagery!" ( >_>)

[]:             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Thu Aug 24, 2006 7:19 am I also remember these two screens comparing Eva-00's damage i the battle with Bardiel and GNR's split face at the end of EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Sat Aug 26, 2006 9:27 pm i remember the commentary saying something about this....the Eye thing is meant to be part of the stigmata... The left arm is the arm of Sheilds....and the Right is the arm of swords Thats what they said anyway... That when Unit 01's arm was busted in the Sachiel and Zeruel fights...thats when Shinji loses it and goes at em...all he has left is destructive power This makes me think...... Rei's right arm is injured...she cant fight like that, as we know...the right arm is the arm of swords...(coincidence???....i doubt it)

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sun Aug 27, 2006 6:52 am Don't believe stuff from the commentary. The ADV crew doesn't know shit about Evangelion. Just listen to Greenfield talk about it as proof of that.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Sun Aug 27, 2006 1:25 pm really... the thing with the arms sounds like it makes sense to me...but why do we hate him?...he didnt say anything in the commentaries that seemed off to me

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Aug 27, 2006 1:42 pm master0rolando wrote: really... the thing with the arms sounds like it makes sense to me...but why do we hate him?...he didnt say anything in the commentaries that seemed off to me
